# Flutter Launcher Icons

This document explains how to use the `flutter_launcher_icons` package to generate app launcher icons for your Flutter project.

* Open the `flutter_launcher_icons.yaml` file located in the root directory of your project and edit it.
* The app generated by FSDA CLI already includes a sample image for the launcher. You can replace it as needed.
* Run the following command to apply the launcher icon changes:

  ```bash
  dart run flutter_launcher_icons
  ```
